regression_checks.name: cards_played NOT incremented in resolve_card()
regression_checks.details: resolve_card() in merlin_card_system.gd logs to story_log and applies effects — no cards_played increment. StoreRun.resolve_choice() remains canonical owner.

regression_checks.name: Orphaned process_card() removed from merlin_effect_engine.gd
regression_checks.details: grep for 'func process_card' returns no results. Only comment references remain (lines 536, 585 — describe protection filter behavior). 9125 chars successfully deleted.

regression_checks.name: LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD = 0 (director q-20260412-001)
regression_checks.details: merlin_constants.gd line 74: 'const LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD := 0'. Comment confirms director decision applied.

scenarios.name: Happy path: LLM generates clean text, 0 faction keywords
scenarios.flow: generate_card → _generate_card_two_stage → generate_with_system → _wrap_text_as_card → 3 effects (no keyword match) → validate_faction_card → _validate_card → PASS
scenarios.details: Option 2 has exactly 2 effects: [ADD_REPUTATION:faction, ADD_KARMA:2]. Passes _validate_card(effects.size() <= 3). Card returned to caller.

scenarios.name: LLM timeout (25s warm / 90s cold)
scenarios.flow: _run_llm timeout → return {error: LLM timeout} → _generate_card_two_stage returns {ok: false} → generate_card falls to get_fastroute_card()
scenarios.details: Timeout handled at line merlin_ai.gd:291-295. FastRoute pool provides valid fallback. No crash. LLM_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS=25000ms warm, 90000ms cold start.

scenarios.name: Ollama not running (is_ready=false)
scenarios.flow: generate_card → is_llm_ready()=false → {ok: false, error: LLM not ready} → FastRoute fallback
scenarios.details: merlin_llm_adapter.gd:267-269. MerlinCardSystem checks llm_result.get('ok', false) at line 162. FastRoute activated.

scenarios.name: Malformed JSON from GM brain (smart effects Stage 2.5)
scenarios.flow: Smart effects GM call fails → calculate_smart_effects returns [] → Stage 2.5 skipped (smart.size() != 3) → Card uses _wrap_text_as_card effects
scenarios.details: merlin_llm_adapter.gd:390-404: 'if smart.size() == 3' guard. If GM fails, smart=[] → size!=3 → effects unchanged. Card generation continues normally.

scenarios.name: 1 faction keyword in narrative ('druide' only)
scenarios.flow: _wrap_text_as_card faction scan → 1 match → options_out[2].effects = [ADD_REP:f3, ADD_KARMA, ADD_REP:druides] → 3 effects → _validate_card PASS
scenarios.details: 3 effects is exactly the max. _validate_card line 699: 'effects.size() > 3'. 3 is not > 3. PASS.

scenarios.name: 2+ faction keywords in narrative (CRITICAL PATH: 'chene' + 'menhir')
scenarios.flow: _wrap_text_as_card → 2 factions match → options_out[2].effects = [ADD_REP:f3, ADD_KARMA, ADD_REP:druides, ADD_REP:anciens] = 4 effects → validate_faction_card PASS (no size check) → MerlinCardSystem._validate_card FAIL (4 > 3) → FastRoute used
scenarios.details: BUG: faction keyword auto-tagging loop adds 1 effect per faction match. Options starts at 2 effects. 2 faction matches = 4 total. Celtic narrative with both druidic AND primordial/megalithe vocabulary triggers this. Frequency estimate: 40-60% of LLM-generated Celtic cards.

scenarios.name: Narrative fallback #1 used: 'chenes centenaires' + 'pierre moussues' (contains 'ancien')
scenarios.flow: NARRATIVE_FALLBACKS[0]: 'La brume s'epaissit entre les chenes centenaires. Un murmure ancien resonne...' → scan: 'chene' (druides) + 'ancien' (anciens) → 2 matches → 4 effects → same failure
scenarios.details: The first NARRATIVE_FALLBACK itself triggers the bug. Any run where Jaccard dedup uses fallback #1 will also fail _validate_card and silently fall to FastRoute.

scenarios.name: 0 verbs extracted, repair call fails
scenarios.flow: labels.size()=0 after repair → VERB_POOL_SAFE fallback → 3 labels guaranteed → card built normally
scenarios.details: _wrap_text_as_card:489-513 padding logic. Pool always non-empty (7 triplets × 3 = 21 verbs). Labels always padded to 3.

scenarios.name: FastRoute pool exhausted + emergency card
scenarios.flow: pool empty → _fastroute_seen.clear() → if still empty → _get_emergency_card() → hardcoded valid card with 3 options
scenarios.details: _get_emergency_card() at line 736 returns valid structure: text + 3 options with valid effects (HEAL_LIFE, ADD_REPUTATION). Always succeeds.

scenarios.name: Dead constant GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS
scenarios.flow: merlin_llm_adapter.gd:29 declares 'const GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS := 30000'. Search shows zero usages of this constant in the generation pipeline.
scenarios.details: The actual timeout is LLM_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS = 25000 (warm) and LLM_POLL_TIMEOUT_FIRST_MS = 90000 (cold) in merlin_ai.gd. GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS is dead code. Not a crash but misleading for maintainers.

bugs.title: Faction keyword auto-tag causes effect overflow, silently failing _validate_card
bugs.description: In _wrap_text_as_card(), the faction keyword scan loop appends one ADD_REPUTATION effect to options_out[2] for EACH faction whose keywords appear in the narrative text. Option 2 already has 2 effects: [effects[2] from generate_contextual_effects, ADD_KARMA]. When 2+ factions match their keywords (e.g., 'chene'=druides + 'menhir'=anciens), option 2 has 4+ effects. validate_faction_card() in the adapter does NOT check effect count. But MerlinCardSystem._validate_card() at line 699 enforces max 3 effects per option: 'if effects.size() > 3 → return invalid'. Result: the LLM card is thrown away, FastRoute fallback is used. LLM generation is silently bypassed for ~40-60% of Celtic narrative cards.
bugs.root_cause: validate_faction_card() (adapter) and _validate_card() (card system) have inconsistent rules. Adapter doesn't cap effects per option; card system does. Faction keyword loop can overflow before hitting the card system validator.
bugs.fix_strategy: In _wrap_text_as_card() faction keyword loop (line 615-626), add a guard: only append the ADD_REPUTATION effect if options_out[2]['effects'].size() < 3. Add a flag to exit the outer faction loop after the first match (max 1 auto-tag effect). This keeps option 2 within 3 effects while preserving the most relevant faction tag.
bugs.frequency: HIGH — any Celtic narrative with 2+ factions mentioned (druides/anciens co-occur frequently in Celtic lore)

bugs.title: GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS constant in adapter is dead code
bugs.description: const GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS := 30000 is declared but never used in the generation pipeline. Actual timeouts are LLM_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS=25000 and LLM_POLL_TIMEOUT_FIRST_MS=90000 in merlin_ai.gd. The discrepancy (30s vs 25s) could mislead maintainers into thinking 30s is the actual timeout.
bugs.fix_strategy: Remove GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS from merlin_llm_adapter.gd or replace with a comment referencing the real timeout in merlin_ai.gd.

json_repair_coverage.details: 4-strategy repair chain: raw JSON extraction → common error fixes → aggressive repair (truncation, bracket closure) → regex field extraction. Used for GM structured calls. Two-stage narrative flow does NOT use JSON repair (free text + programmatic wrapping). JSON repair is defense-in-depth for Stage 2.5 (smart effects) and Stage 3 (consequences).

fallback_chain.details: Every failure path has a fallback. Emergency card always works. No softlock possible.

timeout_handling.details: _run_llm() cancels generation on timeout and returns {error: ...}. Caller falls to FastRoute.

effect_type_consistency.verdict: ALLOWED_EFFECT_TYPES ⊆ VALID_CODES. All LLM-generated effects that pass validate_faction_card() will also pass _validate_card() type check. No type mismatch possible.

new_tasks.title: Fix: faction keyword auto-tag overflow in _wrap_text_as_card
new_tasks.description: BUG-FACTION-OVERFLOW (HIGH): In _wrap_text_as_card() lines 615-626, the faction keyword scan adds one ADD_REPUTATION to options_out[2] per faction that matches. Option 2 already has 2 effects (contextual + ADD_KARMA), so 2 faction matches = 4 effects, failing _validate_card(max 3). FIX: Add guard before append: 'if options_out[2]["effects"].size() < 3'. Add flag to exit outer loop after first match (only 1 auto-tag per card, keeping option 2 at max 3 effects). Test: narrative with 'druide' + 'menhir' keywords should produce valid card (not FastRoute fallback).
